# gsm_squadron_template (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gsm_squadron_template" "example" {
  project_id  = "d290f1ee-6c54-4b01-90e6-d701748f0851"
  name        = "game-server-template"
  description = "Squadron template for game servers"

  variables_json_schema = jsonencode({
    "type" : "object",
    "properties" : {
      "minecraft" : {
        "type" : "object",
        "properties" : {
          "serverVersion" : {
            "type" : "string",
            "default" : "java21",
            "description" : "마인크래프트 게임 서버의 버전입니다. https://hub.docker.com/r/itzg/minecraft-server/tags 을 참고해주세요."
          }
        },
        "required" : [
          "serverVersion"
        ]
      },
      "minReplicas" : {
        "type" : "number",
        "default" : 1,
        "description" : "준비 시켜둘 최소한의 게임 서버 수 입니다."
      },
      "maxReplicas" : {
        "type" : "number",
        "default" : 10,
        "description" : "최대 동시 실행 가능한 게임 서버의 수 입니다."
      },
      "ready" : {
        "type" : "string",
        "default" : "30%",
        "description" : "ready (할당 가능한 서버) 게임 서버의 수 입니다. % 지정 시 maxReplicas 를 기준으로 계산됩니다."
      },
      "alloc_label_1" : {
        "type" : "string",
        "default" : ""
      },
      "alloc_label_2" : {
        "type" : "string",
        "default" : ""
      },
      "CAG_NAMES" : {
        "type" : "array",
        "items" : {
          "type" : "string"
        },
        "description" : "Cluster allocation group names",
        "default" : [
          "default-cag"
        ]
      },
      "ASG_TARGETS" : {
        "type" : "array",
        "items" : {
          "type" : "object",
          "properties" : {
            "name" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "AutoScaling group name"
            },
            "min" : {
              "type" : "integer",
              "description" : "Minimum replicas"
            },
            "max" : {
              "type" : "integer",
              "description" : "Maximum replicas"
            },
            "ready" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "Ready replicas (number or percentage)"
            }
          },
          "required" : [
            "name",
            "min",
            "max",
            "ready"
          ]
        },
        "description" : "AutoScaling group targets",
        "default" : [
          {
            "name" : "default-asg",
            "min" : 3,
            "max" : 50,
            "ready" : "2"
          }
        ]
      },
      "tolerations" : {
        "type" : "array",
        "items" : {
          "type" : "object",
          "properties" : {
            "key" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "Toleration key"
            },
            "operator" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "Toleration operator (Equal, Exists)",
              "enum" : [
                "Equal",
                "Exists"
              ],
              "default" : "Equal"
            },
            "value" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "Toleration value"
            },
            "effect" : {
              "type" : "string",
              "description" : "Toleration effect",
              "enum" : [
                "NoSchedule",
                "PreferNoSchedule",
                "NoExecute"
              ]
            }
          },
          "required" : [
            "key",
            "effect"
          ]
        },
        "description" : "Pod tolerations for node taints",
        "default" : []
      }
    }
  })

  gotpl = <<-EOT
containers:
  minecraft:
    type: main
    image: "itzg/minecraft-server:{{ .minecraft.serverVersion }}"
    env:
      - name: EULA
        value: 'true'
    ports:
      - name: minecraft-tcp
        containerPort: 25565
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 1000m
        memory: 2Gi
  monitor:
    type: sidecar
    image: saulmaldonado/agones-mc
    args:
      - monitor
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 100Mi

allocationLabels:
  label_1: {{ .alloc_label_1 | default "default_foobar" }}
  bar: {{ .alloc_label_2 | default "default_foobar2" }}

health:
  initialDelaySeconds: 60
  periodSeconds: 10
  failureThreshold: 30


{{- if .tolerations }}
tolerations:
{{- range .tolerations }}
  - key: "{{ .key }}"
    operator: "{{ .operator }}"
    value: "{{ .value }}"
    effect: "{{ .effect }}"
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

# ClusterAllocationPolicy - using group-based allocation
clusterAllocationPolicy:
  group:
    names:
{{- range .CAG_NAMES }}
      - "{{ . }}"
{{- end }}

# AutoScalingPolicy - using group-based autoscaling
autoscalingPolicy:
  group:
    targets:
{{- range .ASG_TARGETS }}
      - name: "{{ .name }}"
        min: {{ .min }}
        max: {{ .max }}
        ready: "{{ .ready }}"
{{- end }}

EOT
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gotpl` (String) Go template content for rendering squadrons
- `name` (String) Name of the template
- `project_id` (String) Project ID where the template belongs

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the template
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `variables_json_schema` (String) JSON schema for template variables validation

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `template_id` (String) Squadron template ID (version-specific)
- `template_metadata_id` (String) Squadron template metadata ID (stable identifier)
- `version` (Number) Template version number

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `default` (String)
